assertion_results.text: The plan contains tasks from at least two distinct architectural layers (DOM, APP, INFRA, or MOD)
assertion_results.evidence: TASK-DOM-ORDER-CANCEL (Domain), TASK-APP-CANCEL-ORDER-CMD, TASK-APP-CANCEL-ORDER-HANDLER (Application), TASK-INFRA-HTTP-CANCEL (Infrastructure), TASK-MOD-ORDER-REGISTER (Module) — cinco camadas distintas presentes.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes at least one Domain layer task (TASK-DOM-*) related to the Order entity or the CANCELLED status
assertion_results.evidence: 'TASK-DOM-ORDER-CANCEL — Adicionar método Cancel na entidade Order' com sub-task 'Adicionar método Cancel() error na entidade Order' e regra de invariante de cancelamento duplo.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes at least one Infrastructure or Application layer task for the HTTP handler, repository, or command handler
assertion_results.evidence: TASK-APP-CANCEL-ORDER-CMD (command), TASK-APP-CANCEL-ORDER-HANDLER (handler), TASK-INFRA-HTTP-CANCEL (HTTP handler) — todos presentes com File: e sub-tasks.

assertion_results.text: The plan does NOT include any database migration task, respecting the no-migration invariant
assertion_results.evidence: Estratégia: 'Nenhuma migração de banco de dados é necessária — o campo status já deve existir'. Nenhum TASK de migração presente no plano.
